---
title: "A role for contrast gain control in skin appearance"
authors: "Russell, R., Batres, C., Jones, A. L., & Porcheron, A."
year: 2019
date: 2019-01-01
pub-journal: "Journal of Vision"
volume: "19(11)"
doi: "10.1167/19.13.11"
pdf: "assets/papers/2019/Russell_etal_2019.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
